sentence: 他出门旅游时喜欢带点肉干当零食。
pinyin: Tā chū mén lǚ yóu shí xǐ huān dài diǎn ròu gān dāng líng shí.
english: When traveling, he likes to bring some dried meat as a snack.

sentence: 这个地区以轻工业为主，主要生产纺织品。
pinyin: Zhè gè dì qū yǐ qīng gōng yè wéi zhǔ, zhǔ yào shēng chǎn fǎng zhī pǐn.
english: This area is dominated by light industry, mainly producing textiles.

sentence: 鱼塘里放了一批新鱼种，等到秋天就能捕了。
pinyin: Yú táng lǐ fàng le yī pī xīn yú zhǒng, děng dào qiū tiān jiù néng bǔ le.
english: A new batch of fingerlings was put in the fish pond; they'll be ready to catch by autumn.

sentence: 媒体的公信力来自持续准确的报道。
pinyin: Méi tǐ de gōng xìn lì lái zì chí xù zhǔn què de bào dào.
english: A media outlet's public credibility comes from consistently accurate reporting.

sentence: 他第一次看马球比赛，觉得非常刺激。
pinyin: Tā dì yī cì kàn mǎ qiú bǐ sài, jué de fēi cháng cì jī.
english: He watched a polo match for the first time and found it very exciting.
